title: Friends and Festivities in Vegas
summary: A group of Helen's friends booked an AirBnB in Las Vegas for their birthday, so we set up our van in their driveway and joined them. I have been to Las Vegas a number of times but I was either a little kid, or camped out at Red Rocks on a climbing trip. Neither Helen nor I had visited the city itself in our adult lives. Despite it not being our usual scene, we both had a blast. We walked along Fremont Street and the Strip, played Top Golf, got all-you-can-eat sushi, and visited Meow Wolf! After our visit with friends, we spent a few nights camped at Red Rocks to climb and hike. The highlight was hiking the Calico Tanks trail, which was a fun hike on slick rock that ended with a view of the park and Las Vegas.
